title: Better Fishing Loot
description: Small improvements to the fishing loot table for 'junk' items.
body:
This datapack alters the loot table for fishing 'junk' items. The changes make fishing a more worthwhile activity, especially early game. It's small and vanilla friendly, so not overpowered at all. The items were chosen to be useful and make some sense in the loot table.

For example, items like leather boots, tripwire hook and bowls were removed. Instead you may get things like a glow ink sac, slime ball or rarely a gold ingot.
